aboutUs.Simplicity: Simplicity of booking is our target. Our new website makes your trips even simpler
aboutUs.Ejazza: Mak Travel is dedicated to helping clients optimize their travel programs and providing best-in-class service to travelers globally. We arrange your flight bookings, hotel booking, Insurance, car rentals, vacation packages, and sport events booking around the globe. We are committed to a trusted and reliable service for all our clients.

fareRules.allChangesNote: All Changes are prior to scheduled departure of the first flight. Does not include additional no-show charges.
fareRules.pleaseNote: Please Note: The add-on service charges, convenience fee, and the discount you have received using a coupon code is non-refundable. The final refund amount will be adjusted as per the deductions.
fareRules.airlinePolicyNote: *Airlines stop accepting cancellation/change requests 4 - 72 hours before departure of the flight, depending on the airline. The airline fee is indicative based on an automated interpretation of airline fare rules. Ejazza doesn't guarantee the accuracy of this information. The change/cancellation fee may also vary based on fluctuations in currency conversion rates. For exact cancellation/change fee, please call us at our customer care number.

Modal.body1: With Flexible Ticket you can reschedule your flight up to 24 hours before departure, paying only the fare difference. The product can be used once for your outbound flight, your returning trip or even both at the same time.
Modal.body2: You can change the date and time of your flights, while keeping the same airline and destination.
Modal.body3: You can reschedule your journey with a phone call up to 24 hours (one day) before departure.
Modal.body4: Your new flight dates need to be chosen within a year of your original booking and your new ticket won't be refundable.
Modal.body5: Flexible Ticket cannot be used to change passenger names, classes or destinations.
Modal.body6: Flexible Ticket can only be purchased when booking your trip.

terms.title: Terms
terms.content:
This site displays the terms and conditions under which we provide our services to our customers on the Internet. By using this site, you are agreeing to the terms and conditions as detailed below:

1. Mak Travel is not responsible for any technical glitches (internet problem, system down, technical error in issuing the ticket by the airline or GDS) during the ticketing. Mak Travel reserves the right to take any action (refund or if there is a fare increase, the full amount will be charged to you).

2. Reservation

All information and data of the reservation is the responsibility of the person who made the reservation and Mak Travel is not responsible for any errors related to the data, dates or travel destinations.

When requesting a refund or change, you can send a copy of the ticket and your request via WhatsApp number +201111144895.

3. Travel Documents

It is the responsibility of the traveler to have all the documents required by the country traveling, including the validity of the passport, any type of visa required, hotel reservations, health or financial conditions, and any other requirements, and Mak Travel has no responsibility in this regard.

4. Ensure any type of visa is needed for your trip.

5. Cancellation charges may apply for each refundable ticket in addition to the airline fees.

6. Flight cancellation for any reason may incur service charges for each ticket.

7. Reissue fees may apply for each ticket in addition to airline fees if any required reason for reissue and all charges are nonrefundable.

8. Modification and change date only through Mak Travel to avoid other fees.

9. Please be at the boarding gate before 4 hours of your scheduled time of departure.

10. Confirm your flight timing 24 hours before flight departure.

11. Change or cancellation of reservation 72 hours before flight departure.

12. Mak Travel is not responsible for any baggage related disputes (PC, KG) that might change based on the airline. Contact the airline for baggage details.

13. Mak Travel is not responsible for any changes or cancellations of flights from the airline.

14. Mak Travel is not responsible for the requirements of Covid-19.

15. Unused tickets:
- If you are not using your ticket, please notify Mak Travel via email or WhatsApp.
- Mak Travel has the right to cancel the unused ticket and refund the taxes according to airline policy.

16. Refund will be processed according to the airline or hotel agent policies.

Mak Travel reserves the right to amend any of the site's services.

This site is subject to the laws of the Arab Republic of Egypt.

privacy-policy.title: Ejazza Travel Privacy Policy
privacy-policy.content:
This privacy policy has been compiled to better serve those who are concerned with how their 'Personally Identifiable Information' (PII) is being used online.

PII, as described in privacy law and information security, is information that can be used on its own or with other information to identify, contact, or locate a single person, or to identify an individual in context.

Please read our privacy policy carefully to get a clear understanding of how we collect, use, protect or otherwise handle your Personally Identifiable Information in accordance with our website.

What personal information do we collect?

When issuing a ticket on our website, you may be asked to enter your name, email address, phone number, credit card information, or other details to help you with your experience.

When do we collect information?

We collect information when you enter it on our site, including during:

  • Flight ticket issuing
  • Hotel booking
How do we use your information?

We may use the information we collect in the following ways:

  • To quickly process your flight and hotel booking.
How do we protect your information?

Our website is scanned regularly for security holes and vulnerabilities. We use Malware Scanning and secure networks. Sensitive data is encrypted via SSL.

All transactions are processed through a gateway provider and not stored on our servers.

Do we use 'cookies'?

Yes. Cookies help remember and process bookings and understand your preferences. You can choose to disable cookies via your browser settings.

If you disable cookies, some features may not function properly.

Third-party disclosure

We do not sell, trade, or transfer your Personally Identifiable Information to outside parties.

Third-party links

We do not include or offer third-party products or services on our website.

Advertising & Analytics

We use cookies from third-party vendors such as Google to compile data about user interactions with ads and the website.

User Rights

Users can visit our site anonymously. Privacy Policy link includes the word 'Privacy' and can be found on the homepage.

You will be notified of any changes on our Privacy Policy Page.

You can update your personal info by logging into your account.

Behavioral Tracking

We do not allow third-party behavioral tracking.

Children Online Privacy Protection

We comply with COPPA. Parents are in control of data collected from children under 13.

Why do we collect email/phone?
  • To process hotel and flight bookings and send order updates.
  • To send offers and related service info.
SPAM Compliance

We do not use false/misleading emails. You may unsubscribe anytime by following the instructions at the bottom of emails.

Terms and Conditions

Please also visit our Terms and Conditions page governing the use of our website.

Contact Us

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy:

Website: maktravel.com
Phone: 01123324859
Cairo, Egypt

Last Edited: 2024-05-10
